title: Privacy Policy
_notice: PLACEHOLDER — Replace with your own privacy policy before launching.
intro: This Privacy Policy describes how [Your Company] ("Company", "we", "us") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use [Your App] ("Service").
section1_desc: We collect the following types of information:
section1_items: Account information (email, name, profile image) via OAuth providers
Usage data (login history, feature usage, error logs)
Payment information (processed by third-party payment providers)
section3_desc: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption at rest and in transit, access controls, and regular security audits.
section4_desc: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with third-party service providers (payment processors, hosting, analytics) who are bound by confidentiality agreements.
section5_desc: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, data is permanently removed within 30 days, subject to legal retention requirements.
section6_desc: You have the right to access, correct, export, and delete your personal data. Contact us to exercise these rights.
section7_desc: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use third-party tracking cookies.
section8_desc: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via the Service or email.
section9_desc: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at [privacy@example.com].
